full_text:
Yang (Zhengxiu)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang, styledZhengxiu. A respected elder, he was sent by Wang Yun to reassure Li Jue but instead gathered his followers and left. Yang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
